.status-bar.background: rgb(11, 13, 15) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

.view-content.background: rgb(22, 26, 29) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

body.background: rgb(22, 26, 29) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

body.styled-scrollbars.background: rgb(22, 26, 29) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

div.is-active.is-clickable.nav-file-titl.background: rgb(138, 92, 245) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

div.is-selected.mod-complex.suggestion-i.background: rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.09) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

div.mod-active.workspace-leaf.background: rgb(22, 26, 29) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

div.mod-complex.suggestion-item.background: rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.09) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

div.mod-horizontal.mod-left-split.mod-si.background: rgb(11, 13, 15) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

div.mod-horizontal.mod-right-split.mod-s.background: rgb(11, 13, 15) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

div.prompt.background: rgb(11, 13, 15) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

div.workspace-leaf.background: rgb(11, 13, 15) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

kbd.background: rgb(11, 13, 15) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

pre.background: rgb(11, 13, 15) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

pre.language-js.background: rgb(11, 13, 15) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box
